{{Quotetrans3|Gar nioz-ko ren fal skadzit!|Nice. I try to be civil—an' all I get's a 'thank you' that'd make a corona sailor blush!|Shem-Larn|Star Wars (1977) 51}}
'''Shem-Lern''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] gunrunner who held information regarding the capture of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] pursued Shem-Lern, intent on getting this information, but their chase was cut short when [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] ordered the pair back to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] to participate in a critical mission to infiltrate and destroy the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] known as the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']].<ref name="marvel51" />
